creator: sanpei@sanpei.org
text:
Some symbolic links which is in 2.2.8-RELEASE are missing
	in ftp.FreeBSD.ORG.
	  Currently FreeBSD-stable is FreeBSD-3.0-stable,
	not FreeBSD-2.2-stable. Some old links are still linked to
	FreeBSD-stable directories.

	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/2.2.8-RELEASE/xperimnt/
			--> link to ../../FreeBSD-stable/xperimnt
	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/2.2.8-RELEASE/commerce/
			--> link to ../../FreeBSD-stable/commerce

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/2.2.8-RELEASE/xperimnt/
			--> link to ../../branches/2.2-stable/xperimnt
	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/2.2.8-RELEASE/commerce/
			--> link to ../../branches/2.2-stable/commerce
